package rulecoverage

func PositiveCreateSingleInLoopInsteadOfBatches() string {
    ruleID := "create_single_in_loop_instead_of_batches"
    family := "data_access"
    severity := "contextual"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "GORM .Create(...) used inside loops with no visible CreateInBatches(...) path in the same function."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
